name: m2m_connected_category
script: answer = gs.hasRole("taxonomy_admin") || new global.TaxonomyUtil().isTaxonomyManager() || new global.TaxonomyUtil().isTaxonomyContributor(current.topic.taxonomy.toString()) || new global.TopicPermissionUtil().isTopicManager(current.topic.toString()) || new global.TopicPermissionUtil().isTopicContributor(current.topic.toString()) || current.isNewRecord();

name: nlu_batch_test_utterance
sc_request.comments
script: current.requested_for == gs.getUserID() || current.opened_by == gs.getUserID() || current.caller_id == gs.getUserID() || current.watch_list.indexOf(gs.getUserID()) > -1 || gs.hasRole('itil') || gs.hasRole('ess_requestor') || gs.hasRole('service_fulfiller');
